subcodes.title: Words spoken at Goodall home in Oakland, 1912-10-03
subcodes.first_line: I am going to say "welcome," to you, instead of your welcoming me. I am most happy to be here with you.
subcodes.subjects: @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @unity; oneness of humanity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love
